metadata.title: Francisco Pérez
metadata.description: Francisco Pérez — Full Stack Developer specializing in React, Next.js, Node.js & TypeScript. Explore my projects, professional experience, and get in touch.
metadata.keywords: Full Stack Developer, Web Development, React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Portfolio, Francisco Pérez

hero.name: Francisco Pérez
hero.tagline: Architecting robust backends and intuitive digital experiences.

about.title: About Me
about.paragraph1: I'm a Full Stack Developer with experience in JavaScript, React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, and SQL. I graduated from The Bridge, where I acquired practical skills through real-world projects while applying agile methodologies and teamwork.
about.paragraph2: I specialize in building robust backends and intuitive APIs, but I enjoy working across the entire stack. Frontend: React, Next.js, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript. Backend: Node.js, Express, Python, REST APIs. Databases: MongoDB, SQL.
about.paragraph3: When I'm not coding, you can find me exploring new tech trends, optimizing workflows, or enjoying a good cup of coffee while planning my next project. Open to opportunities and collaborations.

meraParivar.name: MVP Mera Parivar
meraParivar.description: Responsive landing page and payment gateway built with React, JavaScript and Node.js, featuring PayPal API and GeoIP integration. Developed for The Bridge crew challenge in collaboration with NGOs ItWillBe and Mera Parivar.

questWeaver.name: Quest Weaver
questWeaver.description: Real-time virtual board with Socket.IO, OAuth integration for authentication, and state storage in PostgreSQL. Enables simultaneous participation, instant synchronization, and customization.

libraryApi.name: Online Library
libraryApi.description: User and book management application with CRUD functionalities. Built with Express and TypeScript, storing data in JSON files.

ligatgm.name: Liga TGM
ligatgm.description: Web application developed as a freelance project using TypeScript and Firebase.

tis.title: Full Stack Developer
tis.subtitle: T.I.S. Consultoría de IA
tis.description: Built a multi-tenant AI-powered contact center platform (MarIA) using microservices architecture. Developed a real-time voice AI pipeline processing inbound calls through STT → LLM → TTS with telephony integration. Implemented an MCP server integrating CRM/ERP data for AI agents. Designed a credit-based billing system with multi-tenant isolation and JWT-authenticated REST API. Maintained CI/CD pipelines with parallel test suites, automated versioning, and scheduled deployments.

ligatgm.title: Full Stack Developer (Freelance)
ligatgm.subtitle: Liga TGM
ligatgm.description: Migrated the full platform from Vue.js to Next.js (TypeScript) achieving feature parity and improving performance via React Server Components. Built a dual competition system supporting leagues (round-robin with live standings) and tournaments (automatic and manual bracket generation). Implemented role-based authentication including admin panel, user management, and ban/session handling.

catapulta.title: Full Stack Developer
catapulta.subtitle: Catapulta
catapulta.description: Developed a Ponder-based system to index and process smart contract events (Ethereum, Polygon) in real time. Designed an MCP for CLI that allows using the CLI through natural language, translating requests into executable commands. Implemented custom CLI commands to optimize contract deployment and verification using Foundry. Developed a hybrid payment platform integrating Stripe and cryptocurrency payments via smart contracts.

adoptavalenciano.title: Fullstack Developer
adoptavalenciano.subtitle: Adopta un Valenciano
adoptavalenciano.description: Implementation of route middlewares to optimize data flow and security in the backend. Creation of schemas to manage terms and conditions. Development of controllers to handle interactions between different system components.

adoptaunjunior.title: Backend Developer
adoptaunjunior.subtitle: AdoptaUnJunior
adoptaunjunior.description: Collaborative backend development in open source project connecting junior developers with mentors.

avanza.title: Specialist Warehouse Worker
avanza.subtitle: Avanza Externalización de Servicios
avanza.description: Management of material returns and reverse logistics for Telefónica.

thebridge.title: Full Stack Web Developer
thebridge.subtitle: The Bridge Digital Talent Accelerator
thebridge.description: Full stack web development, including Front-End, Back-End, databases, version control, and DevOps. Certifications in Backend, Docker, GitHub, MongoDB, SQL, CSS, ES6, HTML, JavaScript, and Object Oriented Programming.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.headline: Let's Build Something.
contact.description: I'm currently open to new opportunities and collaborations. Whether you have a question, a project idea, or just want to say hi, I'll try my best to get back to you!
